title: clutia alaternoides f. glauca
intro: Clutia alaternoides f. glauca, also known as the glossy clutia, is a variant of the Clutia alaternoides plant, which is a species of flowering plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. Clutia alaternoides f. glauca is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial and anti-inflammatory compounds that have been used to treat various health conditions. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. In traditional medicine, Clutia alaternoides f. glauca is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its leaves and stems are sometimes used in herbal remedies to treat a range of ailments.
